items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-95 northbound between .2 miles south of Exit 4: US 322 EAST - COMM BARRY BR/NEW JERSEY and .4 miles north of Exit 4: US 322 EAST - COMM BARRY BR/NEW JERSEY. There is a lane restriction.
